name: sonarqube-diff-review
description: Review SonarQube issues only when they overlap the current Git diff.

interface.shortDescription: Review SonarQube findings in changed lines
interface.longDescription: Download, inspect, and triage SonarQube issues against a Git diff. Report or fix only findings whose primary location overlaps changed files and changed lines.
defaultPrompt: Review SonarQube issues in my current diff.
Download SonarQube issues and match them to changed lines.
Inspect sonar-issues.json and report only diff findings.
